title: psydrax graniticola
intro: Psydrax graniticola, also known as the granitic Psydrax, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to Madagascar and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. Traditional herbal preparations of Psydrax graniticola include infusions and decoctions, which may be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever and respiratory problems.
